title: iria neilsonii
intro: Iria neilsonii is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. The plant is native to the subtropical regions of China and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues. The medicinal properties of Iria neilsonii include its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant effects, which contribute to its health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and soothing skin irritations. Iria neilsonii can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
